allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix voice pipeline: team card redesign, trigger auth, classification, and DB write fixes

- Redesign team cards with compact layout, inline action icons, status pills
- Add SMS text messaging via url_launcher sms: scheme
- Fix transcribe trigger 401 auth by hardcoding anon key fallback
- Harden mapAiIntent\(\) with 30+ expanded mappings and fuzzy matching
- Fix voice_note_completed_webhook trigger: use PERFORM instead of SELECT for net.http_post\(\)
- Add RPC function update_voice_note_status to bypass PostgREST ENUM issues
- Rewrite Phase 7 to use RPC for final voice_notes update
- Convert voice_notes.category from broken ENUM to TEXT with CHECK constraint
- Add critical_detected to notifications type constraint
- Add voice_note_status ENUM migration
- Add quick tag overlay, review queue, progress tab, attendance tab

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove 21 redundant files and fix materials query

Codebase cleanup removing ~4,000 lines of dead code:
- Delete unused voice_note_player_card, editable_transcription_box, voice_note_card_view_model
- Delete entire orphaned kanban cluster \(7 files: kanban dashboard, tabs, layout widgets, settings service\)
- Delete old edge function backup \(index_0.ts\)
- Delete superseded PDFs \(roadmap V1/V2, vision V1\), duplicate docs, and loose SQL scripts
- Move schema reference file from Migrations/ to docs/ \(not a runnable migration\)
- Fix MaterialStateAgent query to use correct column names \(material_name, material_category\)
- Add project_id/account_id to edge function entity inserts
- Add isScrollControlled + error handling to QuickTag overlay for mobile web
- Add diagnostic logging to recording/upload flow
- New migration: add project_id/account_id to entity tables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix materials tab empty state and event_type constraint violation

- Wrap parallel DB fetches in MaterialStateAgent with _safeFetch\(\) so
  one RLS-blocked query \(boq_items, finance_transactions\) doesn''t crash
  the entire Future.wait and silently show "No material data"
- Add mapEventType\(\) to edge function to normalize AI-returned event
  types \(e.g. "update", "issue"\) to DB CHECK constraint values
  \(project_update, issue_reported, approval_request, instruction, information\)
- Add diagnostic logging for each material fetch query

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
